title: K8sBackend struct + from_uri() URI parsing
description:
What: Define the K8sBackend struct and implement from_uri() to parse and validate secretx:k8s:<namespace>/<secret-name>[?key=<key>] URIs without making any network calls or file reads.

Algorithm:
1. Define: pub struct K8sBackend { namespace: String, name: String, key: Option<String>, client: tokio::sync::OnceCell<kube::Client> }
2. In from_uri(uri: &str) -> Result<Self, SecretError>:
   a. let parsed = SecretUri::parse(uri)?
   b. If parsed.backend() != "k8s" return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri(...))
   c. Split parsed.path() on '/' exactly once: let (namespace, name) = path.split_once('/').ok_or(SecretError::InvalidUri(...))?
   d. If namespace.is_empty() return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri("namespace must not be empty"))
   e. If name.is_empty() return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri("secret name must not be empty"))
   f. If name contains '/' return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri("secret name must not contain '/'"))
   g. let key = parsed.param("key").map(str::to_owned)
   h. Return Ok(K8sBackend { namespace: namespace.to_owned(), name: name.to_owned(), key, client: OnceCell::new() })
3. Add private helper: async fn build_client() -> Result<kube::Client, SecretError> that calls kube::Client::try_default().await and maps kube::Error to SecretError::Unavailable.

Defensive programming rules:
- from_uri must NOT call Client::try_default() — that is async and may do file I/O.
- Validate all path components at construction; callers should not need to revalidate.
- Never log namespace or name as if they were secrets; they are metadata.
- No unwrap() in non-test code.

Subagent instructions: Spawn research subagent to read secretx-gcp-sm/src/lib.rs from_uri() implementation before writing any code. Spawn validation subagent to run cargo test -p secretx-k8s after implementation.

Tests:
- test_from_uri_valid_no_key: input "secretx:k8s:default/my-secret" -> namespace=="default", name=="my-secret", key==None. Oracle: the parsed URI components.
- test_from_uri_valid_with_key: "secretx:k8s:prod/db-creds?key=password" -> key==Some("password").
- test_from_uri_wrong_backend: "secretx:aws-sm:foo" -> Err(SecretError::InvalidUri).
- test_from_uri_empty_namespace: "secretx:k8s:/my-secret" -> Err(SecretError::InvalidUri).
- test_from_uri_empty_name: "secretx:k8s:default/" -> Err(SecretError::InvalidUri).
- test_from_uri_no_slash: "secretx:k8s:default" -> Err(SecretError::InvalidUri).
- test_from_uri_slash_in_name: "secretx:k8s:default/a/b" -> Err(SecretError::InvalidUri).
